text_original: This engages you with hours of fun. Even though the memory dissipates and you have to refresh the AI memory again with your story line.
text_zh: 这会让你沉浸在数小时的乐趣中。尽管记忆会消散，你不得不再次向人工智能刷新你的故事情节。
reply_original:
I'm so glad you're having hours of fun with Fantasia! Regarding the memory issue, we actually just launched a brand-new Memory Service upgrade to improve long-term retention. 

To help us fix this, could you please email support@fantachat.ai with your UID and a screenshot of what the AI forgot? Our devs will look into it ASAP!
reply_zh:
我很高兴你能从 Fantasia 中获得长久的乐趣！关于记忆问题，我们实际上刚刚推出了全新的记忆服务升级，以改善长期记忆。

为了帮助我们解决这个问题，请将您的 UID 以及 AI 遗忘内容的截图发送至 support@fantachat.ai。我们的开发人员会尽快进行调查！
